name: krill-afk
description: Agent Forge Kit (AFK) — Marketplace for Spec Driven Development tools and skills compatible with GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, and VS Code.

plugins.name: agent-forge
plugins.description: Spec → Code + Pull Request pipeline plus a one-time repository context builder. Bundles two orchestrator meta-skills (afk-skill-router, context-builder-orchestrator) and their supporting sub-skills, helper scripts, and a session bootstrap hook.
